title: Remove One Element to Make the Array Strictly Increasing
titleCn: 删除一个元素使数组严格递增

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,10,5,7] Output: true Explanation: By removing 10 at index 2 from nums, it becomes [1,2,5,7]. [1,2,5,7] is strictly increasing, so return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: By removing 10 at index 2 from nums, it becomes [1,2,5,7]. [1,2,5,7] is strictly increasing, so return true.

testcases.input: nums = [2,3,1,2] Output: false Explanation: [3,1,2] is the result of removing the element at index 0. [2,1,2] is the result of removing the element at index 1. [2,3,2] is the result of removing the element at index 2. [2,3,1] is the result of removing the element at index 3. No resulting array is strictly increasing, so return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: [3,1,2] is the result of removing the element at index 0. [2,1,2] is the result of removing the element at index 1. [2,3,2] is the result of removing the element at index 2. [2,3,1] is the result of removing the element at index 3. No resulting array is strictly increasing, so return false.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1,1] Output: false Explanation: The result of removing any element is [1,1]. [1,1] is not strictly increasing, so return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The result of removing any element is [1,1]. [1,1] is not strictly increasing, so return false.
